## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Configure plugin with `...`
2. Trigger event `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages from OpenCode's log or stderr output from `openclaw`.
